title: fraxinus excelsior proles angustifolia
intro: Fraxinus excelsior proles angustifolia, also known as the Narrow-leaved Ash, is a lesser-known variety of the European Ash tree, characterized by its narrower leaves and slender branches. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The Narrow-leaved Ash has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and promote urination. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal benefits.
